title: Border like Battle Royale
description: A mod that adds a command that narrows the barrier as in the "battle royale" genre games
body:
## Description:

Border like Battle Royale is a Minecraft mod designed for players who enjoy a more dynamic and challenging gameplay experience. This mod introduces a command that allows you to shrink the world border incrementally, creating an intense and competitive environment. Perfect for UHC (Ultra Hardcore) games or any scenario where you want to force player encounters and add a thrilling twist to your survival gameplay.

## Features:

- World Border Shrinking: Use the /borderstart command to gradually shrink the world border.
- Customizable Parameters: Define the amount by which the border shrinks, the time it takes to shrink, and the delay between each shrinkage.
- Chat Notifications: Players are notified in the chat when the border shrinking starts and when it reaches its final size.
- Automatic Control: The shrinking process continues automatically according to the parameters set, freeing you to focus on the game.

## Command:


```
/borderstart <shrink_amount> <shrink_time> <delay_time>
```


- shrink_amount: The amount by which the border will shrink each time.
- shrink_time: The time (in seconds) it takes for the border to shrink.
- delay_time: The delay (in seconds) between each shrink.

## How to Use:

Install the mod and start your Minecraft server.
Use the /borderstart command with the desired parameters to initiate the border shrinking process.
Watch as the world border gradually shrinks, increasing the tension and pushing players closer together.
Players will receive a chat notification when the border shrinking is completed.

## Example Usage:


```
/borderstart 5 60 120
```


This command will shrink the world border by 5 blocks within 60 seconds, with a 120-second delay between each shrink.
